category_sources: Official site https://umo.ci/ says umoci modifies Open Container images and is an Open Container Initiative project.
source_facts.description says reference OCI implementation for creating, modifying, and inspecting images.
display_name_sources: Official site and repository use "umoci" at https://umo.ci/ and https://github.com/opencontainers/umoci.
docs_sources: Official project site https://umo.ci/ includes usage and quick start links.
Official reference documentation is at https://umo.ci/reference/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is non-empty; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official site says umoci modifies Open Container images and has a subcommand-based CLI.
